PR Review Bottleneck: Break PRs into smaller chunks (under 200 lines).
Request early peer reviews during the drafting stage.
Implement automated linting to reduce trivial review comments.
Development Bottleneck: Refine technical requirements before starting work.
Identify and clear technical debt in core files.
Quality Bottleneck: Increase unit test coverage for new features.
Implement a 'zero-bug' policy for current sprint.
Add integration tests to catch edge cases earlier.
Release Bottleneck: Enable blue-green deployments for faster rollbacks.
Review CI/CD pipeline for flaky tests.
Contribution Bottleneck: Set aside dedicated 'Deep Work' blocks for coding.
Reduce meeting overhead for the IC.
